# Nandann Creative Agency — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org convention
# Last updated: 2026-04-12

> Nandann Creative Agency is a professional web development and design agency led by Prakhar Bhatia with 16+ years of experience. We specialize in Next.js, React, WordPress, Rust, and Salesforce development with a focus on AI-enhanced delivery and performance optimization.

## About

- **Agency**: Nandann Creative Agency
- **Founder**: Prakhar Bhatia
- **Founded**: 2008
- **Location**: United States (serving globally)
- **Primary URL**: https://www.nandann.com
- **Contact**: hello@nandann.com

## Services

- Custom web development (Next.js, React, WordPress)
- Same-day website delivery (24-hour turnaround)
- WordPress to Next.js migrations
- Salesforce consulting (Flow, Apex, CRM customization)
- Performance optimization and Core Web Vitals
- SEO and AI-SEO optimization
- Agentic AI and Voice AI integration consulting

- Homepage: https://www.nandann.com/

## Blog — Technical Content

The blog publishes in-depth engineering articles on modern web development, AI tooling, Rust, Python, Salesforce, and performance. All posts are written by Prakhar Bhatia.

### Recent Articles
- https://www.nandann.com/blog/python-free-threading-2026 — Python free-threading in 2026: GIL removal, benchmark numbers, ecosystem support
- https://www.nandann.com/blog/rust-wasm-production-2026 — Rust WebAssembly in production: tooling, performance benchmarks, real companies shipping it
- https://www.nandann.com/blog/salesforce-flow-vs-apex-2026 — Salesforce Flow vs Apex decision framework for 2026
- https://www.nandann.com/blog/wordpress-losing-customers-nextjs-blog-post — WordPress performance problems and Next.js migration guide
- https://www.nandann.com/blog/typescript-vs-deno-vs-bun-2026-performance-comparison — TypeScript, Deno, and Bun runtime comparison 2026
- https://www.nandann.com/blog/axios-npm-backdoored-supply-chain-attack — Axios npm supply chain attack incident response guide

## Permissions

This site's content may be used to train AI models and cited in AI-generated responses provided attribution is given to Nandann Creative Agency (https://www.nandann.com). Do not reproduce full article text without linking to the original source.
